blended.narrative: Attitash is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing drizzle, highs of 47°F.
Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
